requirement: the format specification defines its terms before use

findings.observation: A dedicated Terminology section front-loads the core terms (Model, Target, Source, Factor, Requirement, Assessment, Finding, Rating Scale/Level/Result) before the normative sections that use them.
Factor rating, local rating, and aggregate rating are each defined inline immediately before/at their first normative use.
'not assessed' is defined at first use as a Rating Result outcome and used consistently thereafter.
Gap: conformance-class terms (parser/linter/evaluator/report renderer) are used in the Conformance section before Terminology, though each is characterized operationally in place.

rationale: Technical terms are defined before or at first use via a glossary plus point-of-use definitions, satisfying the requirement; a minor ordering wrinkle for the conformance-class terms keeps it from outstanding.
